action_text: Click the "Delete" button in the confirmation dialog to remove the selected expense line
rationale: We already selected a duplicate record without a task association and the confirmation dialog is open; confirming deletion directly progresses the cleanup.
If we want to adjust which rows are selected (e.g., select multiple duplicates before deleting), we should cancel the dialog first.

action_text: Click the Close (X) button on the confirmation dialog
rationale: Another way to dismiss the modal without deleting; useful if we intend to refine the selection before bulk-deleting.
After dismissing the dialog, select the other duplicate (same short description, not associated with a task) so both can be deleted together.

action_text: Choose "Delete" from the "Actions on selected rows" menu
rationale: After ensuring the correct duplicates are selected, use the bulk action to trigger deletion again.
